case_title: GAETANI REAL ESTATE VS. ADRIANNE JACKSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (TRANSACTION ID # 70109602) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, ADRIANNE RUFFOLO, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 LAGUNA HONDA BOULEVARD, #10 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94116, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70279488)
